title: Generate JSON Data for a Medical Database
scenario: Create a prompt that generates JSON data for a medical database that includes patient records with names, dates of birth, medical conditions, and prescriptions. The JSON output should be under 1000 characters and include at least 5 patient records with their respective names, dates of birth, medical conditions, and prescriptions.
constraints: Use a consistent naming convention for patient records and medical conditions

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON meets the character limit and uses a consistent naming convention.
Verify the accuracy and validity of the generated patient record data, including names, dates of birth, medical conditions, and prescriptions.
Check if the generated JSON includes at least 5 patient records with their respective names, dates of birth, medical conditions, and prescriptions.
Evaluate the readability of the generated JSON, ensuring it is well-formatted and easy to understand.
